mapper.sql: task_id, tenant_id, user_id, task_type, resource_key, status, stage, message, request_json, result_json, partial_result_json, error_message, version, created_at, started_at, completed_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_task(task_id, tenant_id, user_id, task_type, resource_key, status, stage, message, request_json, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{taskType}, #{resourceKey}, #{status}, #{stage}, #{message}, #{requestJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM analysis_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT FROM analysis_task WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND task_type = #{taskType} AND resource_key = #{resourceKey} AND status IN ('queued', 'running') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM analysis_task WHERE status = 'queued' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_task SET status = 'running', stage = #{stage}, message = #{message}, error_message = NULL, started_at = COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'queued'
UPDATE analysis_task SET stage = #{stage}, message = #{message}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'running'

UPDATE analysis_task SET stage = #{stage}, message = #{message}, partial_result_json = #{partialResultJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'running'

UPDATE analysis_task SET status = 'succeeded', stage = 'completed', message = '分析完成', result_json = #{resultJson}, error_message = NULL, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status IN ('queued', 'running')

UPDATE analysis_task SET status = 'failed', stage = 'failed', message = '分析失败', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status IN ('queued', 'running')
